metadata.title: Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol (SBP) | Harvestt
metadata.description: Learn how Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol gives Bitcoin mining a verifiable clean-energy attestation layer for institutional capital and compliance teams.
metadata.ogDescription: Verification and attestation infrastructure designed to align Bitcoin mining with verified clean energy use and institutional disclosure requirements.

hero.title: Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol
hero.lead: The trust layer between energy, mining, and capital.
body: The Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol (SBP) is designed to incentivize Bitcoin miners to use verified clean energy while allowing investors to possess BTC in a manner that is verifiably beneficial for the climate, without compromising Bitcoin's fungibility.
Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol built SBP to resolve the verification gap in Bitcoin mining energy claims with a standardized, auditable, and cryptographically secured attestation framework.
asideBody: The mining industry's current approach to energy disclosure is fragmented, self-reported, and largely unverifiable.
Institutional capital allocators require auditable energy provenance data before any direct or indirect exposure to Bitcoin mining infrastructure.
hero.thesis: Verification and attestation infrastructure designed to align Bitcoin mining with verified clean energy use and institutional disclosure requirements.
hero.supportingText: SBP turns clean energy verification into an institutional data layer that can be reviewed by miners, investors, auditors, and compliance teams.

proofRail.label: institutional capital blocked by energy disclosure gaps
annual Bitcoin network energy consumption requiring attestation

items.title: Verify
items.subtitle: Energy Source Verification
items.body: Collect data on miners' energy consumption by connecting to existing mining infrastructure and match that energy data with proof of clean energy consumption.

items.title: Attest
items.subtitle: Cryptographic Attestation
items.body: Verified energy data is cryptographically signed and timestamped to produce an immutable attestation record. Each attestation is anchored to the Bitcoin blockchain, creating a permanent, auditable link between energy consumption and mining output that cannot be retroactively altered.

items.title: Enable
items.subtitle: Institutional Integration
items.body: Attested energy records are packaged into structured data products that integrate with institutional compliance workflows.

overview.heading: Why SBP exists
overview.intro: A clean energy claim is only useful if it can be verified, audited, and used inside institutional diligence workflows.

cards.title: Standardize disclosure
cards.body: Harvestt was built specifically to resolve this verification gap by providing a standardized, auditable, and cryptographically secured attestation framework.

cards.title: Preserve Bitcoin's fungibility
cards.body: The protocol does not say "The BTC you just mined is sustainable"; it creates an incentive layer around the network's overall energy footprint.

cards.title: Connect Bitcoin to climate capital
cards.body: Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol (SBP) is a bridge between Bitcoin and the tens of trillions of climate capital that seeks opportunities to invest in and accelerate the clean energy transition.

proof.heading: Compact facts for diligence teams
proof.intro: Each proof point below is already reflected elsewhere in approved Harvestt material and is assembled here for route-specific review.

annual Bitcoin network energy consumption requiring attestation

operatingModel.heading: From measured energy data to institutional attestation
operatingModel.intro: SBP follows a three-step protocol from raw energy data to institutional-grade attestation.

steps.title: Verify
steps.subtitle: Energy Source Verification
steps.body: The foundational and initial layer of verification provides a comprehensive understanding of a miner's energy sourcing and ensures that each BitREC genuinely reflects clean energy attributes.
bullets: Collect data on miners' energy consumption by connecting to existing mining infrastructure
Match energy data with proof of clean energy consumption through EACs and other methods
Use cutting-edge MRV solutions to ensure sustainable practices and emissions reductions in methane mining

steps.title: Attest
steps.subtitle: Cryptographic Attestation
steps.body: Verified energy data is cryptographically signed and timestamped to produce an immutable attestation record anchored to the Bitcoin blockchain.

steps.title: Enable
steps.subtitle: Institutional Integration
steps.body: Attested energy records are packaged into structured data products that integrate with institutional compliance workflows, while Harvestt continues to build integrations across software, hardware, firmware, and pools.

standards.heading: Built for credible claims
standards.intro: Credibility matters most, which can be achieved by aligning with widely accepted frameworks, transparent data practices, and reputable independent verification.

items.title: Greenhouse Gas Protocol Scope 2 Guidelines
items.body: SBP follows Greenhouse Gas Protocol Scope 2 Guidelines so miners can make unique and exclusive claims about their clean energy usage.

items.title: RE100-aligned methodology
items.body: Miner requirements are designed around the most widely accepted frameworks like Greenhouse Gas Protocol and RE100.

items.title: Energy Attribute Certificates (EACs)
items.body: EACs are globally accepted contractual instruments that enable the substantiation and verification of energy generated, delivered, and consumed on a shared energy grid.

items.title: Third-party auditing
items.body: The protocol is auditor-agnostic and partners with reputable third-party auditors with high-quality data and expertise in energy and emissions verification.

market.heading: Compliance infrastructure unlocks institutional capital
market.intro: Sovereign wealth funds, pension systems, insurance allocators, and licensed asset managers collectively manage over $15 trillion in capital that is currently restricted from Bitcoin mining exposure due to energy disclosure requirements. SBP provides the regulatory infrastructure these institutions need to allocate.
